text: Rajesh was incredibly professional. Fixed my entire wiring issue in under 2 hours. Highly recommended!
Amazing work on our smart home setup. Very knowledgeable and friendly. Will definitely hire again.
Good work overall. Fixed the panel issue quickly. Slightly late arrival but quality work.
Anita is the best! She diagnosed and fixed a tricky electrical fault that two other electricians couldn't find.
Installed our EV charger perfectly. Very thorough with safety checks. Great communication throughout.
Mike responded within 15 minutes to our water emergency. Fixed the burst pipe and cleaned up everything. A lifesaver!
Great job on bathroom renovation. Quality work at a fair price. Took a bit longer than estimated but the result is worth it.
Priya installed a water-saving system that cut our bill by 30%. Very eco-conscious and professional.
David built us the most beautiful custom bookshelf. Incredible craftsmanship and attention to detail.
Our kitchen cabinets are absolutely stunning. David is a true artist. Worth every penny!
Installed hardwood floors throughout our home. Meticulous work, perfectly level, beautiful finish.
Sarah did a great job restoring our antique dining table. Looks brand new! Very careful with the details.
James had our AC running perfectly in no time. Very thorough diagnostic and fair pricing.
Excellent furnace installation. James explained everything clearly and the system runs so quietly now.
Meera's air quality testing revealed issues we never knew about. The ventilation fix made a huge difference.
Dr. Ross is an exceptional tutor! My daughter's SAT score improved by 200 points. Cannot recommend enough.
Finally understand calculus thanks to Dr. Ross. Patient, clear explanations, and great practice problems.
Arjun taught me Python from scratch. Now I can automate my work tasks. Fantastic teacher!
Lisa's deep cleaning service is incredible. My apartment has never looked better. She's thorough and efficient.
Hired Lisa for move-out cleaning. Got my full deposit back! She left the place spotless.
Carlos did a great job on our office cleaning. Very professional and thorough. Reasonable pricing too.
